economic_notes: First Nation holds units in Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership and Ontario First Nation General Partner Inc. (carrying values nominal). Also holds investments in Rainy Lake Tribal Development Corporation, Boundary Waters Anishinaabeg Development LP, Rainy Lake Tribal Resource Management, and Nanicost Ltd. 1468069 Ontario Limited o/a Gobe Corporation is a fully consolidated subsidiary. Flood claim litigation ongoing.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Province is Ontario. 1468069 Ontario Limited o/a Gobe Corporation is a fully consolidated subsidiary. Significant demand debt includes CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative loan of $2,399,400 and multiple flood claim litigation loans. Total long-term debt is term loans $2,472,179 plus demand debt $4,939,258 = $7,411,437. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,254,231 + Health Canada $389,170 + Ontario ministries ($259,564+$149,754+$94,461+$174,799+$57,735+$158,500) + Small Communities Fund $757,112 + Shooniyaa Wa-Biitong $204,256 + OFNLP $505,493 + Fort Frances Tribal Area Health Services $148,945 + Weechi-It-Te-Win $872142 + Gichi Ozhibi'ige Ogaamic $424,335 = ~$8,449,477; however using segment disclosure: ISC $4,254,231 + Canada (Health Canada) $389,170 + Ontario $1,732,561 = $6,375,962 plus OFNLP $505,493 = $6,881,455. OSR computed as total revenue minus government transfers using conservative identification. COVID-19 subsequent events noted.
